queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how critical credit history and existing credit obligations function as credit risk drivers that decrease default probability.
Statistical impact of loan duration in months as a determinant that reduces credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of default associated with the absence of a checking account and its contribution to increased credit risk.
